name: Thai Hot & Sour Shrimp Soup (Tom Yum Goong)
recipeIngredient: 2 Stalks lemongrass, cut into 1-inch pieces and smashed using the flat side of a knife; discard the leaves
½ cup Straw mushrooms (canned or fresh)
2 teaspoons Sliced red and green chilis (or to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring water to a boil over high heat.
2. Stir in the curry paste, kaffir lime leaves, and lemongrass. Bring to a boil again.
3. Add shrimp and mushrooms; cook just until the shrimp are done but not overcooked.
4. Remove from heat, stir in fish sauce, and transfer the soup to a serving bowl.
5. Stir in lime juice, then sprinkle chilies and cilantro leaves before serving.
6. Serve hot with cooked rice. Makes 2 servings.
NOTE: Boneless chicken pieces may be used instead of shrimp. Additional fish sauce can also be added at the table if desired.
